name: rockstarr-infra
description: Foundation plugin every Rockstarr client install includes. Scaffolds /rockstarr-ai/, runs onboarding, generates the brand style guide, ingests the knowledge base, captures the tool stack. Owns the cross-bot approve and publish-log lifecycle and email notifications (daily approvals digest, weekly backlog alert, urgent reply-ready email). Every other Rockstarr plugin depends on this — run-onboarding is the entry point for new clients.
